title: diversified_address returns u128, not DiversifierIndex — correct API boundary
description: A contributor might suggest returning zip32::DiversifierIndex directly since that's what find_address returns internally, saving the u128::from() cast. Do not do this. DiversifierIndex is a zip32 internal type; returning it forces callers to import zip32 and to know that DiversifierIndex can be converted to u128 via From. The u128 return is a stable primitive that composes with advance_diversifier_to, arithmetic, and display without any zip32 dependency. The internal cast is the right place to absorb the type boundary.
close_reason: decision records, no code change needed
